name: Barlborough

locations.address:
Bolsover District Council,
Sherwood Lodge,
Bolsover,
Chestefield,

description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Barlborough. It belongs to the North East Local Policing Unit. 

Barlborough is an old village situated next to junction 30 of the M1 motorway. It is in effect split into 2 sites, the old village and the new development known as the Links. Its close proximity to the motorway puts it within easy commuting distance of Sheffield, Derby and Nottingham.
